image:image.image:title: Mechanics fail when motivation design is weak
image:image.image:caption: Mechanics fail when motivation design is weak: Teams are treating gamification design as tooling rollout, but the real constraint is whether work systems, manager behavior, and capability-building routines actually change.

image:image.image:title: Gamification fails at the moment of choice
image:image.image:caption: Gamification fails at the moment of choice: Teams are treating gamification design as tooling rollout, but the real constraint is whether work systems, manager behavior, and capability-building routines actually change.
